---
title: ""
format:
  html:
    theme: cosmo
    toc: false
    css: styles.css
---
  
<div style="text-align: center; margin-bottom: 2em;">
  <img src="/MENA_PERC/images/logo.png" width="300">
  <p style="margin-top: 0.5em; font-size: 0.7em">
    Political Elites and Regime Change in the Middle East and North Africa
  </p>
</div>
  

## Data

This section provides access to datasets produced within the MENA-PERC project.

### Documentation
